name: Old Cuban
description: A sparkling rum cocktail with mint, lime, bitters, and prosecco made with BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho rum. Inspired by BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho dark rum, the Old Cuban was created by Audrey Saunders as a modern classic.
recipe_steps: Combine all the ingredients (except prosecco) in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Double strain, and top with prosecco.
Garnish with a mint leaf float.
searchable_text: Old Cuban main rum BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho rum A sparkling rum cocktail with mint, lime, bitters, and prosecco made with BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho rum. Inspired by BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho dark rum, the Old Cuban was created by Audrey Saunders as a modern classic. ingredients 45 ml BACARDÍ Reserva Ocho rum, 60 ml MARTINI Prosecco sparkling wine, 6 mint leaves, 25 ml simple syrup, 20 ml lime juice, 2 dashes Angostura® bitters recipe steps Combine all the ingredients (except prosecco) in a cocktail shaker with ice. Shake vigorously. Double strain, and top with prosecco. Garnish with a mint leaf float.
